hotel_name: Residence Inn by Marriott Long Island Hauppauge/Islandia

reviews.title: Hire honest maids who don’t steal
reviews.positives: I didn’t like anything about this hotel
reviews.negatives: First off the bed were the most uncomfortable thing I’ve ever slept on. The pillows were the same. Nothing good to say. I checked out and realized I forgot my very expensive slippers. I called a few hours later to let them know. They claimed the maids didn’t find them. I left them in the room and I told them the exact spot. And still claimed no staff turned them in. They apparently hire thieves.
